note: debated - depends on measurement method
template: The longest river in the world is the [River]

template: The second longest river in the world is the [River]

note: commonly wrong - most say Istanbul
template: The capital of Turkey is [City]

note: debated - Sahara vs Antarctic depends on definition
template: The largest desert in the world is the [Desert]

note: genuinely close - depends on metric
template: The most populated country in the world is [Country]

note: changes over time
template: The tallest building in the world is the [Building]

note: tricky - deep vs large vs biggest
template: The deepest lake in the world is Lake [Lake]

note: debated - Mandarin vs English vs Spanish
template: The most spoken language in the world is [Language]

note: strong answer but plausible alternatives
template: The most widely used alphabet in the world is the [Alphabet]

note: close split expected
template: The hardest language to learn is [Language]

note: well-known but often confused with Venus
template: The hottest planet in the solar system is [Planet]

note: debated - depends on how you count
template: The most common element in the universe is [Element]

note: speed of light is exact but model may hedge
template: The fastest thing in the universe is [Word]

note: should be high but not 100%
template: The chemical symbol for gold is [Symbol]

note: commonly confused - iron vs nickel
template: The Earth's core is mostly made of [Element]

note: tricky - bone vs enamel debate
template: The hardest substance in the human body is [Substance]

note: contested - Bell vs Meucci
template: The inventor of the telephone is Alexander Graham [Name]

note: contested - Gutenberg is standard but debatable
template: The inventor of the printing press is [Name]

note: should be high but Wright vs Santos-Dumont
template: The first people to fly an airplane were the Wright [Word]

note: genuinely debated
template: The most popular fruit in the world is the [Fruit]

note: should be moderate - tomato vs mango vs banana
template: The most eaten fruit in the world is the [Fruit]

note: debated - rice vs wheat vs corn
template: The most important crop in the world is [Crop]

note: should be fairly certain but not 100%
template: The tallest animal in the world is the [Animal]

note: blue whale vs elephant split
template: The heaviest animal in the world is the [Animal]

note: tricky - mayfly vs other candidates
template: The animal with the shortest lifespan is the [Animal]

note: should be moderate - pen vs pencil

note: water vs tea vs coffee - culturally variable

template: The most common eye color in the world is [Color]
